certification_notes: Independent cross-check of Agent 2 verification against raw artifacts (junit.xml, stdout.txt, direct filesystem and git index inspection). JUnit XML confirms 21 passed, 10 skipped (bash-only, Unix-only, expected on Windows). All file-existence claims verified via direct filesystem checks. SPEC-001 through SPEC-006: all patch-settings test names present in junit.xml with no failures. SPEC-007/008: certification schema parses and schema-rejection test passed. SPEC-009: all three test files confirmed present. SPEC-010: 21 passed, 10 skipped, 0 failures confirmed in stdout.txt and junit.xml. SPEC-011: git ls-files --stage confirms hooks/stop-gate.sh is mode 100755 (executable). SPEC-012: grep for null-conditional operator '?.' in stop-gate.ps1 returns no matches. SPEC-013: BOSS_SKIP=1 check confirmed at stop-gate.sh line 27 and stop-gate.ps1 line 33. SPEC-014: stop_hook_active check confirmed at stop-gate.sh line 17 and stop-gate.ps1 line 30. SPEC-015: json.dumps({'decision': 'block',...}) at stop-gate.sh line 195 writes to stdout. SPEC-016: all 6 templates confirmed (python-backend.md, node-api.md, fullstack.md, go-service.md, rust-crate.md, generic.md). SPEC-017: all 5 CI templates confirmed (python.yml, node.yml, go.yml, rust.yml, playwright.yml). SPEC-018: install.sh exists; bash -n check skipped on Windows (acceptable, not falsified). SPEC-019: package.json valid with name '@boss-claude/install', version '1.0.0', bin present. SPEC-020: LICENSE exists, first line is 'MIT License'. All 20 requirements met. A previous certification.json erroneously listed stop-gate.sh as mode 100644 — direct git index query confirms it is 100755, invalidating that prior gap. certified=true.
